scripts.build: SITE_URL=${SITE_URL:-https://demo.lotusia.org} node scripts/build.js && npx tailwindcss -i assets/css/input.css -o dist/assets/css/main.css --minify
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/ --project-name=${CF_PAGES_PROJECT:-lotusia-demo} --branch=${CF_PAGES_BRANCH:-main}
